sections.paragraph:
verb לדלות

to draw water; to elicit, extract (inform.)

verb להידלות

be drawn with a pail; extracted (inform.)

adjective

poor, miserable, meager, humble, frugal, mean, scrimpy, shabby, skimp, skimpy, spare, sparing; wretched, beggarly, indigent; lean, slender, slim, jejune, weedy

masculine noun

door, opening
